mapper.select: SELECT MENU_NO AS MENU_NO , MENU_ORDR AS MENU_ORDR , MENU_NM AS MENU_NM , UPPER_MENU_NO AS UPPER_MENU_ID , MENU_DC AS MENU_DC , RELATE_IMAGE_PATH AS RELATE_IMAGE_PATH , RELATE_IMAGE_NM AS RELATE_IMAGE_NM , PROGRM_FILE_NM AS PROGRM_FILE_NM FROM LETTNMENUINFO WHERE MENU_NO > 0 ORDER BY MENU_ORDR
